excerpt: Faith is the testimony...there is no god but Allah...Muhammad is His servant and messenger
Faith is entirely an act (al-īmān ʿamal kulluh)
source_location_hint: Doctrine of faith as comprehensive action

excerpt: Prince of the Faithful ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib (upon him be peace) was foremost among all the Companions in embracing faith, and thus possessed superiority over all other believers.
source_location_hint: Early doctrine on precedence of Imam Ali

excerpt: In these verses, Allah delineates the ranks of believers in several distinct ways. First comes the mention of the earliest emigrants, those who migrated from Mecca. Then follows the second rank—the Helpers of Medina. And third appears the rank of those sincere followers who came after.
source_location_hint: Commentary on Quranic divisions of believers

excerpt: the sum of the name of Muhammad is equal to the number of Islam and the sum of the name of Ali is equal to the number of Iman
source_location_hint: numerical letter-value correspondences (abjad) in cosmological structure
